name: Cooldown Gate

author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Cooldown Gate

Maintains a cooldown-ready flag and consumes it when triggered.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cooldownSeconds` | Cooldown Seconds | `number` | `1` | - |
| `flagKey` | Flag Key | `string` | `cooldownReady` | - |
| `consumeOnPass` | Consume On Pass | `boolean` | `true` | - |
